creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
lang/gcc10 is in place now, hooked to the infrastructure in Mk/bsd.gcc.mk,
and used when GCC 10 requested (explicitly or implicitly) via USE_GCC, so
this exp-run should be ready to go again.

Sorry for the interruption.

The original patch, which only touches Mk/bsd.default-versions.mk, still
applies.
